occurrence_sentence: Their understanding as part of the modern lexicon is intrinsically linked with their involvement in Silicon Valley in the 1970s onwards (for example Apple), and more recently, with some of the big household names such as Uber, Facebook and Instagram.

As outlined in this [accessible article by John Preskill](https://www.quantamagazine.org/john-preskill-explains-quantum-supremacy-20191002/), Google's Quantum Supremacy achievement was based on a very narrow application, specifically aimed at making a QC be able to outperform a classical computer.
As Preskill outlines in his – now relatively well known – [paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/1801.00862), we are currently in what has been termed the Noisy Intermediate State Quantum era of QC.
